title: Parcel
maturity: Guided land-acquisition workflow with deterministic fallbacks and manual verification needs.
shortDescription: A thesis-to-shortlist land research desk with source quality labels.
whyItExists: To turn vague land searches into a structured diligence queue with assumptions, caveats, and next questions.
safetyNote: Parcel does not treat listing links as verified truth and must not be sold as a real estate decision engine.

title: AI Edit
maturity: Real rendering path exists through FastAPI, Redis, workers, and ffmpeg, but production cost and reliability need limits.
shortDescription: A rights-gated short-form video edit factory with browser preview and backend rendering.
whyItExists: To help creators turn approved source media into practical edit recipes and rendered clips.
safetyNote: Use only owned, licensed, or permission-approved media; do not sell unlimited rendering.

title: Weather Desk
maturity: Paper-trading worksheet with optional local runner status and no browser execution path.
shortDescription: A weather-market research worksheet for risk-adjusted paper alerts.
whyItExists: To practice settlement review, uncertainty, and position sizing without placing real orders.
safetyNote: Research and paper-trading only; not financial advice, no private keys, no live orders.

title: MacroBoard
maturity: Static education-first macro dashboard with demo data, uploads, and browser-side calculations.
shortDescription: A macro and portfolio review surface with teaching cards and risk prompts.
whyItExists: To make macro research workflows visible, inspectable, and easier to question.
safetyNote: Education-first decision support; not personalized advice or a trading instruction surface.

title: Next MacroBoard
maturity: Backend-backed AI workflow surface with prototype-level workspace persistence that is not user-scoped yet.
shortDescription: A guided AI macro workspace with evidence cards, risks, sources, and next actions.
whyItExists: To test a more durable shape for Ballzatram's research workspaces before paid accounts exist.
safetyNote: Do not sell durable paid workspaces until auth, user-scoped storage, entitlements, and retention rules exist.

title: Econ Arcade
maturity: Playable static launch hub with multiple learning games and links to newer Next labs.
shortDescription: A cabinet of economics games, simulations, and learning labs.
whyItExists: To teach economic intuition through interaction instead of static explanations.
safetyNote: Games and lessons are educational simulations, not professional policy or market advice.

title: Strategy Studio
maturity: Deterministic game theory curriculum suite with concept engines and debrief prompts.
shortDescription: A strategy-learning map for rational choice, repeated games, auctions, and bargaining.
whyItExists: To let users poke at formal game theory ideas without needing a textbook first.
safetyNote: Educational simulation only; outcomes are models, not predictions.

title: Central Banker
maturity: Playable static macro policy game with dashboards and end-of-term debriefs.
shortDescription: Run a fictional central bank through shocks, credibility pressure, and policy lags.
whyItExists: To make inflation targeting, expectations, and stability tradeoffs feel tangible.
safetyNote: Fictional educational game; not policy, trading, or financial guidance.

title: Prisoner's Dilemma Lab
maturity: Playable repeated-game lab with deterministic opponent archetypes and debriefs.
shortDescription: Test cooperation and betrayal against simple strategic opponents.
whyItExists: To make reputation, retaliation, and repeated-game cooperation visible.
safetyNote: Educational game theory simulation, not behavioral prediction.

title: Invisible Hands
maturity: Playable static market-clearing game plus a newer Next systems simulator path.
shortDescription: A market and systems simulator about price signals, stress, and policy feedback.
whyItExists: To show how decentralized choices and policy interventions push against each other.
safetyNote: Educational simulation only; model outputs are simplified and may be wrong.

title: Supply & Demand Lab
maturity: Next.js deterministic simulation for curve shifts, taxes, controls, and welfare effects.
shortDescription: Move curves and controls to watch market-clearing outcomes change.
whyItExists: To turn basic microeconomics into a manipulable lab bench.
safetyNote: Educational model only; simplified inputs do not represent real markets.

title: The Penitent 2
maturity: Playable manuscript/relic experience with rhythm-battle prototype surfaces in the Next app.
shortDescription: A strange playable manuscript, relic archive, and rhythm-battle experiment.
whyItExists: To keep Ballzatram weird, story-rich, and artifact-driven alongside the useful machines.
safetyNote: Creative prototype; not every page is finished or stable.

title: Signal vs Noise
shortDescription: A future lab about noisy indicators, confidence, and forecast failure.
whyItExists: To help users practice judging evidence before over-trusting a model.
safetyNote: Should remain education/simulation, not a prediction guarantee.

title: Tariff Lab
shortDescription: A future lab for tariffs, retaliation, pass-through, incidence, and welfare loss.
whyItExists: To make international tradeoffs playable instead of abstract.
safetyNote: Educational simulation only; not trade-policy advice.
